jobs.title: Multi-Module .NET Travel Portal
jobs.description:
I’m building a new travel portal that should feel and flow almost exactly like Onetravel (about 90% of its current UX), but written end-to-end in .NET with Bootstrap so the layout stays fully responsive on every page.

Core flow  
From Search → Listing → Detail → Add-On → Contact → Payment → Confirmation each module has to work seamlessly. For the first milestone I need the Flight booking piece up and running before we expand to Hotel, Car, Bus and Holiday packages+ an Android app for the same

• Search flights  
• Flight details page

jobs.title: Modern Food Pouch Design
jobs.description:
I’m releasing a nutrient-dense snack aimed squarely at health-conscious shoppers and need a snack bar packaging that immediately signals freshness, quality, and style. The brief is simple: create a modern, on-trend graphic system that pops on shelf and still feels trustworthy in an online thumbnail. Think clean typography, confident colour choices, and just enough negative space to let the product story breathe.

jobs.title: Class 9 Work & Energy Presentation -- 2
jobs.description:
I need a clear, engaging Microsoft PowerPoint deck that introduces the concept of work and energy to a Grade 9 science class. Please structure the material so a teacher can walk students through each idea in a logical progression, using everyday examples, simple equations, and visuals that hold attention.

The presentation must cover:
• Definitions of work and energy  
• Different types of energy (kinetic, potential, chemical, etc.)  
• The law of conservation of energy, with at least one relatable demonstration or real-world case

Deliverables  
• An editable .pptx file, ready to project in c

jobs.title: Elegant Watch E-Commerce Website
jobs.description:
I’m launching an online store devoted to analog, digital, and smartwatch collections and I need a full-featured e-commerce site built from the ground up. The look and feel must be classic and elegant—think refined typography, a muted palette, and generous white space that lets high-resolution product images shine.

Core requirements  
• Product catalogue with easy category navigation for the three watch types  
• Secure checkout, major card integrations, and wallet options  
• Inventory and order-management dashboard I can run without developer help

jobs.title: Bilingual CBSE Math Video Tutor
jobs.description:
I’m putting together a series of recorded math lessons for CBSE students in Grades 1-5 and need a tutor who can explain every concept clearly in both English and Tamil. The immediate focus is Geometry and Word Problems, but the explanations have to feel age-appropriate and engaging for younger learners.

Here’s how I imagine the workflow: you prepare concise video lessons (roughly 10–15 minutes each) that walk through the topic step-by-step, demonstrate sample questions, and finish with a quick recap or mini-quiz the child can pause and solve before the solution appears. Because these are reco

jobs.title: Smart Order & Inventory API
jobs.description:
I’m building a central API that receives every new order from my Wix storefront, checks real-time stock across three nearby locations, compares both availability and price, then decides which store should fulfill the sale. Once the choice is made, the same service must decrement inventory at that location and raise an instant alert whenever stock dips below a threshold or sales spike unusually.

Because I have no existing back-end, the whole pipeline—orders, inventory, pricing, and alerts—needs to be created from the ground up. Orders integration is my top priority, so the initial milestone sh

jobs.title: Modern Red and Black Logo
jobs.description:
I need a modern logo and business card for my auto repair shop. The color scheme should be red and black. Name of the shop is Gearheads Garage. 

Ideal skills and experience:
- Proficiency in graphic design software (e.g., Adobe Illustrator)
- Experience in creating modern-style logos
- Ability to work with a red and black color palette
- Prior work on business card designs
- Creativity in incorporating auto repair themes (like car or tool imagery)
-Logo needs to work for a lighted sign
Please provide a portfolio with relevant work.
skills: Adobe IllustratorBrandingBusiness Card DesignCreative DesignGraphic DesignIllustratorLogo DesignPhotoshopVisual Design

jobs.title: Energetic Realistic Logo Intro
jobs.description:
I need a fast-paced, 3-to-5-second 3D animation that launches my logo onto the screen in a realistic style bursting with energy. Think sharp lighting, dynamic camera moves, believable materials, and a punchy motion that instantly grabs attention when a video starts.

You’ll receive the vector logo and brand colour codes; feel free to add subtle reflections, particles or a brief sound sting if it enhances the moment without overpowering the brand. Keep the pacing tight and the finish glossy so it works at the beginning of promo videos, social posts, and presentations.
